home.initialLoadingHint: Algorithms, formats, and queue info are loading in the background. You can already start using the UI.
home.runHint: Create Task uploads and starts polling only; One-click Run creates task, waits for completion, then downloads automatically.
home.createTaskSucceeded: Task created and background polling started.
home.createTaskFailed: Create task failed. Check settings or logs.
home.runSucceeded: One-click run completed and auto download finished.
home.runFailed: One-click run failed. Please check logs.
home.apiKeyGuideTitle: Set your API Key before first use
home.apiKeyGuideDesc: Task creation will fail without a valid API Key. Go to Settings, fill your API Key, and run Test Connection first.

task.centerHint: Task Center includes all tasks created from Home via "Create Task" and "One-click Run". In-progress tasks are polled automatically and archived to history after completion.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyHelpText: If your browser has no MVSEP login session, you may be redirected to the homepage. Please log in first, click your username at the top-right, then choose API from the dropdown; or return to GUI and click the link again.
settings.connectionFailed: Connection test failed. Check token, API URL, and proxy.
settings.apiKeyHelp: The first jump may be blocked by the main site. Sign in to MVSEP first, click your account name at the top-right, then choose API in the dropdown. Or return to this GUI and click the link again.
settings.autoSaveFailed: Auto-save failed. Please click Save Settings to retry.
settings.apiKeyRequired: Please set your API Key in Settings before testing connection.
settings.apiKeyRequiredForSubmit: Please set your API Key in Settings before creating tasks.
settings.placeholderTokenNotAllowed: The demo key is placeholder-only. Please use your own API Key.

algorithm.refreshListRunning: Refreshing algorithm list from local cache...
algorithm.refreshListFailed: Failed to refresh list from local cache.
algorithm.fetchLatestRunning: Fetching latest algorithm info from remote...
algorithm.fetchLatestFailed: Failed to fetch latest algorithm info. Check network, token, or proxy.
algorithm.fetchLatestFailedWithConnectionHint: Failed to fetch latest algorithm info. Go to Settings and click Test Connection, then try again.
algorithm.cacheMissing: Local algorithm cache is missing. Please click Fetch Latest Algorithm Info first.
algorithm.cacheRefreshed: Algorithm list refreshed from local cache.
algorithm.latestFetched: Latest algorithm info fetched and written to local cache.
algorithm.noAddOpt: Current algorithm has no add_opt parameters
algorithm.noPresets: No presets yet. Configure parameters on Home and save one.
algorithm.noneFound: No algorithms found. Configure token/API first.
algorithm.noModelParams: This algorithm has no selectable model parameters
algorithm.loadingGuardNotice: Loading algorithm parameters. Please avoid switching language for a few seconds.
algorithm.switchLocaleBlockedNotice: Language switching is temporarily blocked while algorithm parameters are loading.
